summary: Phase 1 Bento-Elite redesign implemented: full navigation with theme toggle, comprehensive bento grid layout with hero, stats, featured project, core stack, 3 project cards, services section, contact CTA, and blog preview. ThemeProvider integrated, SEO metadata updated, framer-motion stagger animations applied throughout.
next_action: Phase 2: Enhance individual project pages, add more blog posts, improve mobile responsiveness, add scroll animations, consider adding a projects/work page with all projects listed.
